plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-575 RP18.P07.M03.S21-RP18.P07.M04.S30 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-575 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP18.P07 implementation workflow slice: the M03 Primary Implementation Slice tail (the ten remaining rows) and the full M04 Secondary Workflow Slice cycle (thirty rows) as two descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H18), Claude review packet (C18), and CP00-576 handoff, without opening AI legal workflows, precedent, clause markup, or DD extraction runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-575 is a clean, descriptor-only RP18.P07 implementation-workflow slice (40 units, RP18.P07.M03.S21-RP18.P07.M04.S30, risk B). Full source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms coverage and boundaries are internally consistent across the live closeout-pack-plan.json (CP575 is queue-front; ledger SHA 13c7ed65…), review-baseline, registry requirements, validators logic, contract case-set, and manifest. Unit count (40), micro-phase split (M03=10, M04=30), micro-title split (Primary 10 / Secondary 30), and deliverable distribution (claude_review 2, implementation 19, failure_recovery 12, security_audit 2, hermes_evidence 2, fixture 1, test 2) match every source; all 10 M03 + 30 M04 rows are present in correct order, each descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false / customer_safe_errors_only=true / raw_payload_included=false. No IO/runtime/DB/network operations exist in package src (grep clean); the no-write attestation chain and manifest assert writes_product_state=false, no_real_data, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, loads_real_fixture_data=false, no cross-tenant access, and all no-leak guards. Production gates are not weakened: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true; the descriptor_verified flag and Hermes production_ready_candidate are scoped strictly to descriptor validation, not product readiness. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob), and Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence packets. CP178+ hardening is satisfied: auth preflight passed, readiness ready, forbidden_review_evidence rejects auth failure / zero-byte / malformed+fenced JSON / tool-call-shaped output / missing fields; pre-review validation commands all exit 0 with closeout-pack:validate correctly deferred to post-review, and post-review artifacts (claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection) are appropriately absent at this review stage. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-575 ai legal workflows core p07 implementation workflow slice descriptor pack
